title: Amazon Has Kicked Off a Sale on Select 4K Steelbooks – Save on Back to the Future, Jurassic World Trilogy, and More
description: Amazon has launched a new sale on a selection of 4K steelbooks. For a limited time, you can score big discounts on Back to the Future, the Jurassic World Trilogy, and more.

title: Preorders Are Live for Brand New Pokémon LEGO Sets, Launching in August and October
description: LEGO has revealed a new selection of Pokémon LEGO sets: Arcanine, Munchlax, Rayquaza, the Iconic Trainer Moments Poké Ball, and an Up-Scaled Red Minifigure. These are all available to preorder right now and set to release in both August and October.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Steam Pre-Orders Have Already Beaten Skull & Bones' Lifetime Sales, Analyst Claims
description: Launch sales projections for Ubisoft's Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake look like a huge improvement on Assassin's Creed Shadows, the franchise's most recent release.

title: Jazwares Brings Exclusive Marvel, KPop Demon Hunters, and Five Nights at Freddy's Collectibles to SDCC 2026
description: IGN has an exclusive first look at all the exclusives collectibles Jazwares will be bringing to Comic-Con, covering franchises like Spider-Man, KPop Demon Hunters, and Five Nights at Freddy's.

title: LEGO Set Leaks Reveal First Pokémon Minifigures, Including Professor Oak and Red, Plus Pikachu and Eevee
description: The first LEGO Pokémon set to include minifigures, featuring Professor Oak and Red, will debut later this year, leaked images have revealed.
